claims.text: CRAFT hand is a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand.
claims.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

claims.text: CRAFT hand has hybrid hard-soft compliance.
claims.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

claims.text: Impacts concentrate at joints in robotic hands during contact.
claims.source_quote: contact is not uniform across the hand. Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

claims.text: Links carry most of the load during contact in robotic hands.
claims.source_quote: contact is not uniform across the hand. Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

claims.text: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid.
claims.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid, and uses rolling-contact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.

claims.text: CRAFT uses rolling-contact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.
claims.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid, and uses rolling-contact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.

claims.text: CRAFT has fifteen motors mounted on the fingers.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

claims.text: CRAFT drives the hand through tendons.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

claims.text: Mounting motors on the fingers keeps the form factor compact and the fingers light.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

claims.text: CRAFT improves strength compared to prior designs in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT improves endurance compared to prior designs in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT maintains comparable repeatability to prior designs in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT improves handling of fragile items in teleoperation compared to prior designs.
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

claims.text: CRAFT improves handling of low-friction items in teleoperation compared to prior designs.
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

claims.text: CRAFT covers 33 out of 33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.
claims.source_quote: the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.

claims.text: The full design of CRAFT costs under $600.
claims.source_quote: The full design costs under $600 and will be released open-source with vision-based teleoperation and simulation integration.

claims.text: CRAFT will be released open-source with vision-based teleoperation.
claims.source_quote: The full design costs under $600 and will be released open-source with vision-based teleoperation and simulation integration.

claims.text: CRAFT will be released open-source with simulation integration.
